name: Tommy Pederson
abstract: Pullman Gerald "Tommy" Pederson (August 15, 1920 – January 16, 1998) was an American trombonist and composer known for his work in jazz, big band, and classical genres.

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: It sure is and Tommy Pederson before that. I couldn’t play like that, you know I really wasn’t that good, but for some reason I fitted.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
